meta.title: Aymeric Demange | Frontend Developer
meta.description: Frontend Developer specialising in React, Next.js and TypeScript. Open to new opportunities.

about.subtitle: Frontend Developer · Bordeaux, France
bio: I'm a frontend developer with 6 years of experience building web products that people actually enjoy using. I care about the details — the transitions, the micro-interactions, the moment a user smiles because something just works.

I've worked across analytics dashboards, SaaS billing flows, marketing landing pages and everything in between. I thrive in cross-functional teams where design and developering speak the same language.

jobs.summary: Led frontend development for a performance marketing platform serving 10k+ users. Owned the component library and led a team of 5 developers.

bullets.title: Product & Developering
items: Led team of 5 developers in agile scrum

bullets.title: Process & Collaboration
items: Worked with product and design daily

jobs.summary: Maintained and developed Ubisoft's marketing websites in production across high-profile game titles, in close collaboration with the US team.

bullets.title: Product
items: High-visibility sites: Rainbow Six Siege, Assassin's Creed Valhalla
New pages and marketing features built with the US team
Dynamic content via Contentful headless CMS and GraphQL

bullets.title: Developering
items: Code reviews and deployments via GitLab

jobs.summary: Built an internal CRM within the IT department to centralise and manage business data for operational teams.

bullets.title: Developering
items: CRM features for internal operations teams
Management interfaces to centralise and administer business data
REST API integration connecting frontend to internal services

jobs.summary: Work-study focused on full-stack web development and customer-facing technical support.

bullets.title: Development
items: Built company website in JS / CSS / HTML / PHP

strengths.subtitle: What I bring
strengths.intro: I don't just write code — I bring craft, speed, and a product mindset to everything I build.

items.title: Execution speed
items.desc: I ship fast without cutting corners. Rapid iteration is a habit, not a shortcut.

items.title: Design sensibility
items.desc: Comfortable in Figma and equally comfortable pushing back when something's off.

items.title: Cross-functional bridge
items.desc: I translate between design, product and developering without losing anything.

items.title: Systems thinking
items.desc: I build components that scale. Patterns, not one-offs. Libraries, not repetition.

values.subtitle: What I believe in
values.intro: These aren't buzzwords. They're what actually shapes how I work and what I'm proud to ship.

items.title: Craft matters
items.desc: Good enough isn't. The last 10% of polish is what separates memorable from forgettable.

items.title: Ownership
items.desc: I treat what I build as mine to care for — not just a ticket to close.

items.title: Clarity first
items.desc: Simple beats clever. I write code and interfaces that are easy to understand.

items.title: Keep learning
items.desc: The stack changes. Curiosity doesn't. I stay close to what's coming next.

entries.note: Specialised in software architecture, IoT systems and advanced web development.
Focused on server-side development, APIs and database management.
Foundation in electronics, industrial computing and programming fundamentals.

skills.subtitle: Tech stack
skills.intro: A focused stack built over 6 years. Every tool here has been used in production.

contact.subtitle: Available for freelance projects, full-time roles, and anything interesting in between. Drop me a line and I'll get back to you quickly.
